content.en:
Wind Tooth Island.

Ye Tian took back those high-grade eternal ancient gold and materials.

However, he didn't immediately set up the Eternal Origin Array.

The Void Origin Circle he arranged last time was still running, and after this Array was broken, he would go and arrange the Eternal Origin Array.

In the days that followed, he continued to comprehend the Origin Rules of the other side in this Void Origin Array.

Before you know it, the five thousand primeval years have arrived.

Click!

The Void Origin Circle shattered and could no longer be used.

"My other side origin rules have made a lot of progress, let's go test it!"

He came to the Monument of the Rules on the other side and tested it.

A number emerges.

【12】

This means that Ye Tian's other side origin rules have reached the realm of one into two, and it was an eight-point realm before, which is equivalent to an increase in the four-point realm this time, and the progress is okay.

And with the improvement of the rules of the Origin on the other side, the Origin of the Other Shore will naturally increase, even faster than the improvement of the Purple Ruin Gold Liquid on the other side.

In fact, the Purple Ruin Gold Liquid on the other side is for those who are stuck in a bottleneck, the Origin Rules of the Other Side cannot be further improved, and the Origin of the Other Shore is stagnant, they will use the Purple Ruins Gold Liquid on the Other Side to improve the Origin of the Other Shore.

In this way, the purple ruin gold liquid on the other side can play its greatest role and break the shackles of the small one.

For example, if Ye Tiancai broke through to the Origin Realm, he exhausted so much of the Purple Ruins Gold Liquid on the other side, which was undoubtedly a waste of this resource.

But he didn't know it at first, so he didn't think much of it.

But if you really want to say regret, that's almost none.

He felt that as long as it was used to improve his strength, it would not be a waste.

Anyway, he hasn't hit a bottleneck yet.

......

Wind Tooth Island, Ice Rain Island.

Ye Tian was ready to arrange the Eternal Origin Array.

He knew that once he laid it out, it would definitely attract the attention of other Origin Realm level geniuses on Wind Tooth Island, and even alarm the Lord of Ice and Rain.

However, it only shocked and envied them, and nothing will happen.

"Let's start decorating!"

Ye Tian took out the 109,600 pieces of high-grade eternal ancient gold, and he was a little reluctant, but when he thought of the benefits of the Eternal Origin Array, he also used up these high-grade eternal ancient gold.

He used these high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold and other materials one by one to build the Eternal Origin Circle.

It didn't take too long for the Eternal Origin Circle to be built.

Now it's time to open the Eternal Origin Circle and connect with the Origin of the Land on the other side of Eternity.

Rumble!!!!!

The Eternal Origin Circle was opened, connecting to the Origin of the Land on the other side of eternity.

This movement was so great that it even made the entire Icy Rain Island tremble, and the fluctuations spread, not only covering the entire Wind Tooth Island, but even transmitting it to the far away area of the Origin Black River.

Icy Rain Island.

The Lord of Ice and Rain looked at Ye Tian's residence and sensed the Eternal Origin Array.

"This is the Eternal Origin Array, the Lord of Endless has built such an Origin Array, this requires 109,600 pieces of high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold!" the Lord of Ice and Rain was shocked.

Where did Ye Tian find so much high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold!

Before Ye Tian built two Void Origin Arrays, she was already very curious.

But this time it's different, this is the Eternal Origin Array!

Compared to other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, Ye Tian was undoubtedly too arrogant!

Of course.

She didn't care too much, whether it was the 109,600 pieces of Eternal Ancient Gold, or the Eternal Origin Array, it wasn't a surprise to her.

Therefore, she continued to cultivate.

And the other other shore-level geniuses on Wind Tooth Island were different, and they were all shocked and envious.

When the news came, even the other island-level geniuses on the other islands of Wind Tooth Island knew about it.

When the Lord of the Heavenly Crossing heard the news, they were envious.

"How can the Lord of Infinity have so much high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold?"

They all have this doubt.

Unfortunately, no one gave them an answer.

......

After the Eternal Origin Array was built, Ye Tian stayed inside the Eternal Origin Array and began to cultivate and comprehend the Origin Rules on the other side.

He could comprehend and cultivate here for more than 88,000 years in the primeval era.

Such a long cultivation can definitely make his Origin Rule realm on the other side of the river soar.

When the time comes, his strength will also skyrocket.

One primeval epoch after another has passed.

During this period, nothing major happened on Fengya Island, but something happened in the eastern seventy-two region, which was undoubtedly just a conflict between some forces, and a force no less powerful than Gu Heng Mountain was destroyed.

But on the whole, this is nothing, and it will not affect the pattern of the eastern seventy-two regions.

And with the help of Ye Tian, the world personality is also constantly improving, and the fame is gradually becoming louder, and many Heavenly Ancestors of the territorial sea boundary gap have gradually walked out of the territorial sea boundary seam.

But in the land of eternity, these days of the Heavenly Ancestor are still not very easy, and they are prone to danger.

is also the Heavenly Ancestor of the Human Race, with Ye Tian's help, it is much safer.

this day.

The conflict between Gu Heng Mountain and the Ice Beast Palace broke out again, and this time the conflict was even more serious, with a trend of all-out war.

......

Guheng Mountain.

The Mountain Lord, the Lord of Gu Heng, and the Lord of Eternal Zero, and other deputy mountain masters opened for a while.

meeting.

The Lord of Eternal Zero was furious: "The Ice Beast Palace has gone too far, and it has even dug up a subsidiary force under our command, and even ransacked our six treasure lands, which is simply a banditry. "

"Moreover, one of the affiliated forces also gave birth to a good genius, who is expected to become a genius of the other side, and was also snatched away by the Ice Beast Palace!" said another deputy mountain master.

"Mountain Lord, what do you say?"

The other deputy mountain lords all looked at the Lord of Gu Heng.

Gu Heng's Lord said, "Indeed, the Ice Beast Palace is indeed very excessive this time, but I also know why they are approaching step by step. "

"Because of what?"

The Lord of Eternal Zero, they are curious.

For a long time, the Ice Beast Palace had only had a partial conflict with them, and it had not directly taken the initiative to invade them, dig up the subsidiary strength, and loot the treasure land.

"Because the Ice Glass Lord of the Ice Beast Palace has broken through, from the middle stage of the Origin Lower Realm to the late Origin Lower Realm realm, a Origin Origin Lower Realm late stage of the Origin Realm, how powerful his strength is, you should know very well. The Lord of Gu Heng said helplessly.

"What, the Lord of Ice Glass has broken through!"

The Eternal Zero's faces changed drastically.

Don't look at it, it has only broken through a small realm, but its strength has improved a lot.

Moreover, there was no strong man in Gu Heng Mountain who could deal with the Lord of Ice Glass, which meant that Gu Heng Mountain could not defeat the Ice Beast Palace. ~
